title: Admin dashboard defaults to production API when configuration is missing
reasoning: If NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL is omitted in a preview, local, or staging build, this client-side admin page silently sends dashboard reads and sales-agent mutations to the production Railway API. Because triggerSalesAgent performs a POST, a misconfigured non-production frontend can execute production admin actions rather than failing closed.
recommendation: Remove the production fallback for admin API calls. Require NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL at build/runtime or derive the API base from a same-environment relative route, and fail visibly when it is not configured.
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: No tests are linked for this feature, and there is no test asserting API base selection under missing environment configuration.
suggestedRegressionTest: Add a test or build-time config validation that fails when NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL is absent for the CEO admin page, and verifies sales-agent actions target the configured base URL.
minimumFixScope: Change API_URL configuration in frontend/app/admin/ceo/page.tsx and add configuration validation for the frontend admin build.
